Nutrient incorporation

Under construction

The module currently holds two classes (NitrogenIncorporation and PhosphorusIncorporation) to represent nitrogen and phosphorus uptake and incorporation into plant biomass. However, since both have identical methods (excluding nitrogen fixation), they will soon be combined into a single class (NutrientIncorporation) for simplicity.

References: this module is based upon the “Nutrient Uptake by Plants” section of the SWAT model (5:2.3).
